title: Oreshura
altTitles: Ore no Kanojo to Osananajimi ga Shuraba Sugiru
My Girlfriend and Childhood Friend Fight Too Much
description:
Oreshura is a romantic comedy anime that follows the complicated and hilarious life of Eita Kidou, a high school student who is completely focused on his studies and dreams of becoming a doctor. After witnessing his parents’ failed marriage, Eita develops a strong dislike for romance and decides to avoid love entirely. Instead, he dedicates all of his time to academics and lives a quiet, peaceful life. Everything changes when Masuzu Natsukawa, the most beautiful and popular girl in school, suddenly approaches Eita with an unexpected proposal. Tired of constantly receiving confessions from boys, Masuzu asks Eita to pretend to be her boyfriend so she can keep other admirers away. Although Eita initially refuses, he is forced into the fake relationship after Masuzu discovers his embarrassing middle school writings and uses them to blackmail him. 

As their fake relationship continues, Eita’s peaceful life quickly turns chaotic when several girls from his past become involved. His energetic childhood friend Chiwa Harusaki refuses to accept the situation, while other girls with their own feelings and secrets begin competing for Eita’s attention. What starts as a fake romance slowly becomes a complicated emotional battle filled with jealousy, misunderstandings, comedy, and unexpected romantic moments.he anime mixes romance, school life, and comedy while parodying common romantic comedy tropes in an entertaining and self-aware way. Each character brings a unique personality and emotional depth to the story, creating both funny and heartfelt interactions throughout the series. Beneath the comedy, the anime also explores themes of trust, insecurity, teenage emotions, and the fear of love and heartbreak.Oreshura became popular for its fast-paced humor, charming characters, colorful animation, and entertaining romantic drama. The series is widely remembered for its funny dialogue, exaggerated relationship conflicts, and the chemistry between its unforgettable cast members.
